title: AstralAzeta's Obsidian Tools
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c254b36a86e0ea1402a07dec244c884b0bdd2dbb.png) [![Alt Text](https://tr7zw.github.io/uikit/social_buttons_icon/Discord-Button-64.png)](https://discord.gg/hFS6faY9tW) [![Alt Text](https://tr7zw.github.io/uikit/social_buttons_icon/Modrinth-Button-64.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/astralazetas-obsidian-tools)
Obsidian tools are strong as diamond. They have worse enchantability, but better durability.
Recipes ![Obsidian Sword](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/46a05ab9a0b07a53ddc26df5f035fe458bce0d1b.png) ![Obsidian Axe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/156e65a1819e2508951c13b428d071280a48c228.png) ![Obsidian Pickaxe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7efb57b4bf8a2a1f16233a872ca855663f0086f0.png) ![Obsidian Shovel](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/056af2f4177bc893b5cc54b6f4c758cc06fe9e29.png) ![Obsidian Hoe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e0421eb6e24ddb1432bc9af3f21104303b485f71.png)
